violations.description: Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Sanitized dishes drying on towels next to the 3 compartment sink.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. 2 wet mops sitting in a crate in the dry storage room were not in a position to allow proper drying.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
